title: Create Shinchan endless runner game with obstacles and scoring

requirements.text: Create a side-scrolling endless runner game where Shinchan character runs continuously from left to right across the screen
acceptanceCriteria: Shinchan character is visible and animated running left-to-right
Background scrolls continuously to create movement effect
Game loop runs smoothly at consistent frame rate

requirements.text: Implement chocobi chip collectibles that spawn randomly along the running path, which Shinchan can collect for points

quotes: scinchan is runing towaeds the chokochips and getiing points

acceptanceCriteria: Chocobi chips appear at random intervals along the path
Collision detection registers when Shinchan touches a chip
Chips disappear upon collection and increment score

requirements.text: Add obstacles (rocks and puddles) that spawn randomly and cause game over if Shinchan collides with them
acceptanceCriteria: Multiple obstacle types (rocks, puddles) spawn randomly
Collision detection triggers game over state on contact
Obstacles are visually distinct from collectibles

requirements.text: Implement progressive difficulty system where game speed increases as player collects more chocobi chips
acceptanceCriteria: Scrolling speed increases gradually based on score
Difficulty progression is noticeable but not abrupt
Speed increase caps at a maximum playable level

requirements.text: Implement dual control system supporting both keyboard arrow keys (up/down or jump) and mouse clicks for controlling Shinchan's movement
acceptanceCriteria: Arrow keys control Shinchan's vertical position or jumping
Mouse clicks provide alternative control method
Both input methods work simultaneously and responsively

requirements.text: Create score tracking system that displays current points, increments with each chocobi chip collected, and shows final score on game over
acceptanceCriteria: Current score is visible during gameplay
Score increments correctly for each chip collected
Game over screen displays final score with restart option

requirements.text: Design a cohesive visual theme inspired by the Shinchan anime aesthetic with playful colors, cartoon-style graphics, and cheerful UI elements that match the lighthearted tone of the game
acceptanceCriteria: Visual style is consistent across all game elements
Color palette and typography reflect anime-inspired aesthetic
UI elements are playful and appropriate for the game's tone

requirements.text: Display generated character and game asset images as static assets from frontend/public/assets/generated directory
acceptanceCriteria: All generated images load from public/assets/generated
Images are properly sized and optimized for gameplay
Fallback handling for missing assets

constraints: Use React Three Fiber for 2D game rendering
Implement game loop with requestAnimationFrame or React Three Fiber's useFrame
Ensure responsive controls work on different screen sizes

required: Shinchan character sprite in running pose, anime style with his signature red shirt and yellow shorts (shinchan-running.dim_128x128.png)
Chocobi chocolate chip snack illustration, small yellow package with cartoon face (chocobi-chip.dim_64x64.png)
Rock obstacle, simple cartoon stone with shading (obstacle-rock.dim_80x80.png)
Puddle obstacle, blue water splash with cartoon style (obstacle-puddle.dim_100x60.png)
Scrolling background with Japanese neighborhood scenery, bright and colorful (game-background.dim_1920x600.png)
